name: Laptop Pro
description: High-performance laptop with Apple M3 chip, ideal for software development and data engineering workloads.

name: Gaming Laptop
description: High-refresh-rate gaming laptop with discrete GPU and fast NVMe storage.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with silent clicks, 6-month battery life, and multi-device pairing.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red switches and RGB backlighting.

name: 4K Monitor
description: 27-inch 4K IPS monitor with USB-C 90W power delivery and HDR400 support.

name: USB-C Hub
description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with 4K HDMI, 100W PD passthrough, SD card reader, and 3 USB-A ports.

name: Webcam HD
description: 1080p 60fps webcam with auto-focus, built-in ring light, and noise-cancelling microphone.

name: Portable SSD
description: 1TB portable NVMe SSD with USB 3.2 Gen 2, rugged aluminum casing, up to 1050 MB/s read.

name: Wool Sweater
description: Classic crewneck sweater in 100% merino wool, soft against skin and naturally temperature-regulating.

name: Running Shoes
description: Lightweight road-running shoes with responsive foam midsole and breathable mesh upper.

name: Denim Jacket
description: Classic straight-fit denim jacket in heavyweight stonewash denim, brass-tone buttons.

name: Cotton T-Shirt
description: Essential everyday tee in heavyweight 100% organic cotton, pre-shrunk and ring-spun.

name: Cargo Pants
description: Technical cargo pants with 8 pockets, articulated knees, and water-resistant finish.

name: Rain Jacket
description: Packable waterproof rain jacket with sealed seams, adjustable hood, and pit zips.

name: Silk Scarf
description: Hand-rolled 100% silk scarf with original botanical print, 90x90cm.

name: Leather Belt
description: Full-grain leather dress belt with polished nickel buckle, 1.25 inch wide.

name: Data Engineering Handbook
description: Comprehensive guide to building scalable data pipelines, covering ingestion, transformation, and serving layers.

name: Python Cookbook
description: Recipes for mastering Python 3, covering data structures, algorithms, concurrency, and metaprogramming.

name: SQL Deep Dive
description: Advanced SQL techniques for analytical queries, window functions, CTEs, and query optimization.

name: Clean Code
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship, covering naming, functions, classes, and refactoring.

name: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: The definitive guide to distributed systems, covering replication, partitioning, transactions, and consistency.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer
description: Timeless advice for software developers on career, code, and craft. 20th anniversary edition.

name: Database Internals
description: Deep dive into how databases work internally: storage engines, B-trees, distributed consensus, and log-structured storage.

name: Algorithms Illustrated
description: Visual introduction to algorithms and data structures, with clear diagrams and Python code examples.

name: Organic Granola
description: Stone-baked granola with rolled oats, raw almonds, coconut flakes, and local honey. No artificial ingredients.

name: Dark Chocolate Bar
description: Single-origin 85% dark chocolate bar from Ecuador, stone-ground and bean-to-bar crafted.

name: Artisan Coffee Beans
description: Light-roast single-origin Ethiopian Yirgacheffe, whole bean, notes of blueberry and jasmine.

name: Greek Olive Oil
description: Extra-virgin olive oil cold-pressed from Koroneiki olives in Crete, PDO certified.

name: Sourdough Bread
description: Naturally leavened country sourdough with open crumb, crisp crust, and 72-hour cold fermentation.

name: Raw Honey
description: Unfiltered wildflower honey harvested from Pacific Northwest hives, naturally crystallized.

name: Mixed Nuts
description: Dry-roasted mixed nuts with cashews, almonds, walnuts, and pecans. No added salt or oil.

name: Matcha Powder
description: Ceremonial-grade Japanese matcha from Uji, Kyoto. Stone-ground from shade-grown tencha leaves.

name: Standing Desk
description: Electric height-adjustable standing desk with dual motor, programmable presets, and anti-collision sensors.

name: Ergonomic Chair
description: Fully adjustable ergonomic office chair with lumbar support, 4D armrests, and breathable mesh back.

name: Bookshelf Oak
description: 5-shelf solid oak bookcase with adjustable shelves and a natural oil finish.

name: Ceramic Lamp
description: Hand-thrown ceramic table lamp with linen shade, warm LED bulb included.

name: Wall Clock
description: Minimalist 30cm wall clock with silent sweep movement and solid walnut frame.

name: Plant Pot Set
description: Set of 3 speckled stoneware plant pots with drainage holes and matching saucers.

name: Throw Blanket
description: Chunky-knit throw blanket in 100% cotton, oversized 130x170cm, pre-washed for softness.

name: Picture Frame Set
description: Gallery wall set of 6 black aluminum frames in mixed sizes (4x6, 5x7, 8x10), shatter-resistant acrylic.
